features.name: unpacked struct parameter with aggregate assignment default
features.description: Code should include an unpacked struct type used as a parameter type with an aggregate assignment pattern default value in an interface declaration
features.snippet:
typedef struct { int test; } axis_cfg_t;
interface axi_stream_if #(axis_cfg_t x = '{test: 1}); endinterface

features.name: struct parameter default referencing another struct parameter
features.description: Code should include a struct-type parameter with a default value that references another struct parameter

features.name: struct parameter default in module port
features.description: Code should include a struct-type parameter with a default value used in a module parameter port declaration
features.snippet:
typedef struct { int test; } cfg_t;
module m #(cfg_t p = '{test: 1}); endmodule
